title: PM Painters Web
desc: A full-stack professional painting service web application built using the MERN stack and TypeScript.
longDesc: PM Painters is a premium MERN stack web application engineered with TypeScript. It serves as a modern digital platform for professional painting services, offering users a beautiful interactive gallery, customized service inquiries, and dynamic color palettes designed to transform spaces.
features: Dynamic service portfolio and color consulting
Fully responsive MERN stack architecture with TypeScript
Modern interactive user experience and layout styling
Streamlined client inquiry and consultation forms

title: theSearchjob
desc: A comprehensive full-stack job portal facilitating real-time job searches, applications, and recruitment management.
longDesc: theSearchjob is a robust, responsive job search platform designed to connect job seekers with potential employers. It features advanced job search filtering, candidate profile building, resume uploads, and an employer dashboard to track applicant pipelines and manage listings.
features: Advanced keyword, role, and location filtering
Employer listing administration and applicant tracking
Candidate resume uploads and profile manager

title: Enamel (Scholar Plus)
desc: A premium educational learning portal featuring interactive course modules, subject-wise progress tracking, and student diagnostics.
longDesc: Enamel Scholar Plus is an elegant, mobile-responsive education dashboard designed for seamless student learning. It offers a structured subject-wise curriculum (Physics, Chemistry, Zoology, etc.), custom study materials, and interactive analytics to monitor learning progress in real-time. Built with a focus on fluid animations and responsive layout structures.
features: Premium glassmorphic study dashboard and progress indicators
Dynamic course navigation and unlock diagnostics
